##  checklist

Please confirm the following standards are met:
- [ ] Submitted files are placed under `skills/<repository-name>/`.
- [ ] Files start with valid YAML frontmatter containing `name:` and `description:`.
- [ ] Checked for duplicate submissions (no clashing names or hashes).
- [ ] All code blocks specify their programming language.
- [ ] No empty section headers or blank placeholder files.
